variants: Zeno Volkov is a recognized expert in the field of occupational therapy. He authored the detailed work titled Gearbloom Prototyping Manual, which has become an important resource for professionals in his field. In acknowledgment of his significant contributions to occupational therapy, Zeno received the Sagefire Merit award. He is also a dedicated member of the Quartzmist Archivists, engaging with colleagues who share his passion for chronicling the history and advances of occupational practices. Throughout his career, Zeno has been guided by his mentor, Maged Rizkallah, who played a key role in shaping his professional journey.
